summary: First iteration: full backend pytest suite (30 tests) and Playwright UI coverage for ULPGL-Goma. Backend 100% pass: auth (admin+publisher), faculties (list/detail), contents (CRUD + approve/reject workflow), search, newsletter, contact, dashboard stats, users. Frontend flows all functional: home, faculties grid, faculty detail with filieres, login → dashboard → article creation → pending validation → logout, newsletter footer, contact form (/app/contacts), header search redirecting to /search with results, mobile menu open/close at 390px.

minor.issue: Slug uniqueness uses Date.now() fallback — works but a second collision in same ms would still fail. Consider using uuid suffix or sequelize unique constraint catch.
Endpoint exists but no UI surface to create new faculty publishers from dashboard (users tab only allows update, not create). Not blocking — register works via curl.

ui_bugs.issue:
React hydration warning:
rendered inside

via Hrseparator component (invalid HTML). Causes console error on every home navigation.

issues: Two search inputs visible simultaneously on desktop: one in the upper bar (data-testid=header-search-input) and a second one near the navigation/main area — may confuse users. Consider keeping a single search entry point or styling them differently.

action_items:
Fix Hrseparator: render a block-level wrapper (e.g.
) or move
out of

to remove React hydration warning.
Optionally add a Create User button in dashboard users tab so admins can register new faculty publishers from UI (backend POST /api/auth/register already supports it).
Optional: collapse the two desktop header search bars into one for better UX.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js uses sequelize.sync({ alter: true }) which is acceptable for dev but should switch to migrations for production.
CORS is wide-open (origin '*', credentials false). OK because JWT is stored in localStorage; just document this.
routes/contents.js PUT /:id rebuilds slug as slug+'-'+id every edit — could cause SEO/dead-links across edits. Consider keeping the existing slug unless explicitly changed.
Newsletter and contact mail are best-effort (no await on sendMail) — fine because SendGrid key empty; verify graceful skip in /app/backend/utils/mailer.js (not viewed in depth).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed contents and timestamp-prefixed newsletter/contact rows; no production data altered. Seed already provides 6 faculties, 3 contents, 2 users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_ulpgl_backend.py (pytest, 30 cases). Frontend exposes data-testids for all flows. SendGrid intentionally MOCKED (no API key → mail SKIPPED but DB persistence verified). Routes: /app/facultes, /app/contacts, /login, /dashboard, /search?q=. JWT stored under localStorage key 'ulpgl_token'.
